steps.text: Review the existing mutual NDA draft note and identify any gaps or issues against the intended structure and Washington-governed mutual NDA context.
Revise and complete the full mutual NDA draft in the scratchpad, ensuring all unknown fields remain marked [BLANK] and the governing law is Washington.
Review and harden the revised draft against the contract-draft checklist (clarity, defined terms, mutuality, IP, term/termination, remedies, boilerplate, and attorney-review disclaimer).
Prepare the final NDA draft in clean markdown form, ready for attorney review, with all placeholders clearly bracketed and the disclaimer included.
